prose:
**Pyridine Fukui–Reactivity Analysis**  Method provenance: DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted RI), single-point in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: read from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`, no optimization (Fukui indices computed at that fixed geometry). Mulliken population analysis (PySCF). SCF converged. No warnings reported.  CLI invocation:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui \
  --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard \
  --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmjihd9mk/live.json
```
Output JSON path: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmjihd9mk/live.json`  Plot of reactivity indices: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/argo_o4-mini/20260703-200643_pyridine_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`  Results (atom numbering 1–11; atoms: N, C, C, C, C, C, H, H, H, H, H):  • Fukui-plus (f⁺):  [0.48422572, 0.32447226, 0.14032091, 0.14039587, 0.29962626, 0.29947708,  –0.14151319, –0.13368410, –0.13365905, –0.13981630, –0.13984545]  • Fukui-minus (f⁻):  [0.064122671, 0.0061877146, 0.11823139, 0.11826260, 0.11206595, 0.11200985,  0.08284851, 0.098179487, 0.098182260, 0.094960093, 0.094949479]  • Fukui-zero (f⁰):  [0.27417420, 0.16532999, 0.12927615, 0.12932923, 0.20584611, 0.20574346,  –0.029332342, –0.017752309, –0.017738396, –0.022428102, –0.022447987]  • Dual descriptor (Δf = f⁺–f⁻):  [0.42010305, 0.31828455, 0.02208953, 0.02213327, 0.18756031, 0.18746723,  –0.22436170, –0.23186359, –0.23184131, –0.23477639, –0.23479493]  Most electrophilic site: atom 1 (N) with f⁺ = 0.48422572  Most nucleophilic site: atom 4 (C) with f⁻ = 0.11826260
